sharedStateObservations.description: Package follows src/ layout with pyproject.toml build configuration
CLI entry point defined in pyproject.toml as llm-compress = llm_compress.cli:main
Package exports __version__, quantize_model, and get_backend in __init__.py

reviewNotes: Package structure is well-organized following Python packaging best practices. Uses modern pyproject.toml with setuptools backend. Correct src/ layout. Version defined in __init__.py as '0.1.0'. All imports working correctly as verified by test_basic.py.
